title: The Eight Legs
bodyText:
Lolth's answer to desertion: **eight agents of varying experience** hunting Varen (and now the "light-bearer," Eddy). Their spoor: eight-pointed-star scratchings that burn Varen's mark, obsidian tokens, poisoned camps, arranged spider corpses. Their vanguard is [[the-assassin]]. Kena killed "a couple" of hers before amputating her way off their list — so **the count may be down to ~6**. Art: art/death-bard.jpg, art/the-ever-approaching.jpg (two more of the eight?).
